Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Hollow Domain]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon can unleash the Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon's Hollow Domain could eliminate a weaker version of the echo Forger technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon used the Hollow Domain to wipe out Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon carried the Hollow Domain in an orb around him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Hollow Domain feels like absolute emptiness and the death of the spirit.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — A gust of the Hollow Domain was used by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon can flood out the Hollow Domain to push against pressure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon used a Hollow Domain to meet the Titan's yellow earth madra.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon's Hollow Domain pushes away pale demons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Little Blue can partially manifest the Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon can extend a Hollow Domain of blue-white madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Hollow Domain is a technique that can clear hunger madra from a room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Hunger madra strands push through the Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — The Hollow Domain flickered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon attempted to cycle for the Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon's Hollow Domain can weaken madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon used the Hollow Domain to flee from an attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — The Hollow Domain is a location or field used by Lindon.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon's Hollow Domain prevents others from overhearing conversations within it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Hollow Domain is a blue-white circle of pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon used his Hollow Domain to catch himself on his Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon projects a dome of the Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon uses his Hollow Domain for defense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Hollow Domain can weaken shadow blades.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Hollow Domain can wipe out two quick Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon uses a Hollow Domain to create space while healing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Little Blue was surrounded by a tiny bubble of blue-white energy known as a Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon calls up the Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's Hollow Domain is a sphere of madra that can stretch for miles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Hollow Domain covers terrain from ground to sky and miles in every direction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Hollow Domain technique can be used to weaken the dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon uses the Hollow Domain to deal with needles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Little Blue defended herself with a brief eruption of the Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Little Blue uses a Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Hollow Domain can wipe out excess energy.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon released the Hollow Domain using his pure core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Hollow Domain is a technique used by Lindon that washes out sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue uses a pulse of the Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Blue uses a Hollow Domain.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
